name: epistemic-skills
description: The full epistemic-discipline collection in one package: a router plus nine disciplines including repo-backed external handoff, continuity, decision persistence, and evidence-locked acceptance, with the helix tandem layer for workflow-skill pairing.

interface.longDescription: A router plus nine composable disciplines for reconnaissance, formal reasoning, evidence, goals, repo-backed external handoff, adversarial review, continuity, decision persistence, and acceptance testing, plus the helix tandem entry point.
defaultPrompt: Route this task through the appropriate epistemic discipline.
Write an evidence-bound completion contract for this goal.
Create a repo-backed outsource handoff and short copy/paste prompt.
Stress-test this high-stakes decision with the gauntlet.
